component.name: antlr
component.description: A framework for constructing recognizers, compilers, and translators from grammatical descriptions containing Java, C#, C++, or Python actions.

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jackson-dataformat-yaml
component.description: Support for reading and writing YAML-encoded data via Jackson abstractions.

component.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
component.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

component.name: jackson-bom
component.description: Bill of Materials pom for getting full, complete set of compatible versions of Jackson components maintained by FasterXML.com

component.name: classmate
component.description: Library for introspecting types with full generic information including resolving of field and method types.

component.name: openpdf
component.description: Open and Free PDF library. It uses the new package name `org.openpdf`.

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL), Version 2.1

component.name: jcip-annotations
component.description: A clean room implementation of the JCIP Annotations based entirely on the specification provided by the javadocs.

component.name: failureaccess
component.description: Contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.internal.InternalFutureFailureAccess and InternalFutures. Most users will never need to use this artifact. Its classes are conceptually a part of Guava, but they're in this separate artifact so that Android libraries can use them without pulling in all of Guava (just as they can use ListenableFuture by depending on the listenablefuture artifact).

component.name: guava
component.description: Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, Google's collections, I/O classes, and much more.

component.name: listenablefuture
component.description:
An empty artifact that Guava depends on to signal that it is providing ListenableFuture -- but is also available in a second "version" that contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture class, without any other Guava classes. The idea is:
- If users want only ListenableFuture, they depend on listenablefuture-1.0.
- If users want all of Guava, they depend on guava, which, as of Guava 27.0, depends on listenablefuture-9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava. The 9999.0-... version number is enough for some build systems (notably, Gradle) to select that empty artifact over the "real" listenablefuture-1.0 -- avoiding a conflict with the copy of ListenableFuture in guava itself. If users are using an older version of Guava or a build system other than Gradle, they may see class conflicts. If so, they can solve them by manually excluding the listenablefuture artifact or manually forcing their build systems to use 9999.0-....

component.name: j2objc-annotations
component.description: A set of annotations that provide additional information to the J2ObjC translator to modify the result of translation.

component.name: findsecbugs-plugin
component.description: Core module of the project. It include all the SpotBugs detectors. The resulting jar is the published plugin.

component.name: json-path
component.description: A library to query and verify JSON

component.name: nimbus-jose-jwt
component.description: Java library for Javascript Object Signing and Encryption (JOSE) and JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

component.name: checkstyle
component.description: Checkstyle is a development tool to help programmers write Java code that adheres to a coding standard

component.name: mockwebserver3
component.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

component.name: mockwebserver
component.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

component.name: okhttp-jvm
component.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

component.name: okhttp
component.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

component.name: okio-jvm
component.description: A modern I/O library for Android, Java, and Kotlin Multiplatform.

component.name: okio
component.description: A modern I/O library for Android, Java, and Kotlin Multiplatform.

component.name: archunit
component.description: A Java architecture test library, to specify and assert architecture rules in plain Java - Module 'archunit'

component.name: android-json
component.description: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. This is the org.json compatible Android implementation extracted from the Android SDK

component.name: commons-beanutils
component.description: Apache Commons BeanUtils provides an easy-to-use but flexible wrapper around reflection and introspection.

component.name: commons-codec
component.description: The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoders and decoders for formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

component.name: commons-collections
component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: commons-logging
component.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well-known logging systems.

component.name: picocli
component.description: Java command line parser with both an annotations API and a programmatic API. Usage help with ANSI styles and colors. Autocomplete. Nested subcommands. Easily included as source to avoid adding a dependency.

component.name: micrometer-core
component.description: Core module of Micrometer containing instrumentation API and implementation

component.name: netty-codec-http3
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-transport-native-unix-common
component.description: Static library which contains common unix utilities.

component.name: reactor-netty-core
component.description: Core functionality for the Reactor Netty library

component.name: reactor-netty-http
component.description: HTTP functionality for the Reactor Netty library

component.name: reactor-core
component.description: Non-Blocking Reactive Foundation for the JVM

component.name: jaxen
component.description: Jaxen is a universal XPath engine for Java.

component.name: junit
component.description: JUnit is a unit testing framework for Java, created by Erich Gamma and Kent Beck.

component.name: byte-buddy-agent
component.description: The Byte Buddy agent offers convenience for attaching an agent to the local or a remote VM.

component.name: byte-buddy
component.description: Byte Buddy is a Java library for creating Java classes at run time. This artifact is a build of Byte Buddy with all ASM dependencies repackaged into its own name space.

component.name: logstash-logback-encoder
component.description: Provides logback encoders, layouts, and appenders to log in JSON and other formats supported by Jackson

component.name: accessors-smart
component.description: Java reflect give poor performance on getter setter an constructor calls, accessors-smart use ASM to speed up those calls.

component.name: json-smart
component.description: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. It is easy for humans to read and write. It is easy for machines to parse and generate. It is based on a subset of the JavaScript Programming Language, Standard ECMA-262 3rd Edition - December 1999. JSON is a text format that is completely language independent but uses conventions that are familiar to programmers of the C-family of languages, including C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, Perl, Python, and many others. These properties make JSON an ideal data-interchange language.

component.name: jopt-simple
component.description: A Java library for parsing command line options

component.name: stringtemplate
component.description:
StringTemplate is a java template engine for generating source code, web pages, emails, or any other formatted text output.
StringTemplate is particularly good at multi-targeted code generators, multiple site skins, and internationalization/localization.
It evolved over years of effort developing jGuru.com.
StringTemplate also generates the stringtemplate website: http://www.stringtemplate.org and powers the ANTLR v3 code generator. Its distinguishing characteristic is that unlike other engines, it strictly enforces model-view separation.
Strict separation makes websites and code generators more flexible and maintainable; it also provides an excellent defense against malicious template authors.
There are currently about 600 StringTemplate source downloads a month.

component.name: commons-compress
component.description: Apache Commons Compress defines an API for working with compression and archive formats. These include bzip2, gzip, pack200, LZMA, XZ, Snappy, traditional Unix Compress, DEFLATE, DEFLATE64, LZ4, Brotli, Zstandard and ar, cpio, jar, tar, zip, dump, 7z, arj.

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description:
Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.
The code is tested using the latest revision of the JDK for supported LTS releases: 8, 11, 17 and 21 currently. See https://github.com/apache/commons-lang/blob/master/.github/workflows/maven.yml
Please ensure your build environment is up-to-date and kindly report any build issues.

component.name: commons-text
component.description: Apache Commons Text is a set of utility functions and reusable components for processing and manipulating text in a Java environment.

component.name: commons-text
component.description: Apache Commons Text is a library focused on algorithms working on strings.

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

component.name: log4j-core
log4j-to-slf4j
component.description: Forwards the Log4j API calls to SLF4J. (Refer to the `log4j-slf4j[2]-impl` artifacts for forwarding SLF4J to the Log4j API.)

component.name: doxia-module-xdoc
component.description: A Doxia module for Xdoc source documents. Xdoc format is supported both as source and target formats.

component.name: xbean-reflect
component.description: xbean-reflect provides very flexible ways to creat objects and graphs of objects for DI frameworks

component.name: aspectjweaver
component.description: The AspectJ weaver applies aspects to Java classes. It can be used as a Java agent in order to apply load-time weaving (LTW) during class-loading and also contains the AspectJ runtime classes.

component.name: assertj-core
component.description: Rich and fluent assertions for testing in Java

component.name: awaitility
component.description: A Java DSL for synchronizing asynchronous operations

component.name: plexus-component-annotations
component.description: Plexus Component "Java 5" Annotations, to describe plexus components properties in java sources with standard annotations instead of javadoc annotations.

component.name: plexus-container-default
component.description: The Plexus IoC container API and its default implementation.

component.name: plexus-utils
component.description: A collection of various utility classes to ease working with strings, files, command lines, XML and more.

component.name: jaxb-core
component.description: JAXB Core module. Contains sources required by XJC, JXC and Runtime modules.

component.name: txw2
component.description: TXW is a library that allows you to write XML documents.

component.name: hamcrest-core
component.description: Core Hamcrest API - deprecated, please use "hamcrest" instead

component.name: hamcrest
component.description: Core API and libraries of hamcrest matcher framework.

component.name: HdrHistogram
component.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.

component.name: hibernate-models
component.description: A de-typed abstraction over reflection and annotations

component.name: javassist
component.description: Javassist (JAVA programming ASSISTant) makes Java bytecode manipulation simple. It is a class library for editing bytecodes in Java.

component.name: annotations
component.description: A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

component.name: annotations
component.description: A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

component.name: jspecify
component.description: An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks

component.name: junit-bom
component.description: This Bill of Materials POM can be used to ease dependency management when referencing multiple JUnit artifacts using Gradle or Maven.

component.name: junit-bom
component.description: This Bill of Materials POM can be used to ease dependency management when referencing multiple JUnit artifacts using Gradle or Maven.

component.name: LatencyUtils
component.description: LatencyUtils is a package that provides latency recording and reporting utilities.

component.name: mapstruct-processor
component.description: An annotation processor for generating type-safe bean mappers

component.name: mapstruct
component.description: An annotation processor for generating type-safe bean mappers

component.name: mockito-core
component.description: Mockito mock objects library core API and implementation

component.name: objenesis
component.description: A library for instantiating Java objects

component.name: opentest4j
component.description: Open Test Alliance for the JVM

component.name: org.osgi.annotation.bundle
component.description: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.annotation.bundle Version 2.0.0

component.description: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.annotation.versioning Version 1.1.2

component.description: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.resource Version 1.0.0.

component.name: org.osgi.service.serviceloader
component.description: OSGi Companion Code for org.osgi.service.serviceloader Version 1.0.0.

component.name: asm-analysis
component.description: Static code analysis API of ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-analysis
component.description: Static code analysis API of ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-commons
component.description: Usefull class adapters based on ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-commons
component.description: Usefull class adapters based on ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.description: ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.description: ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: lombok-mapstruct-binding
component.description: Binding for Lombok and Mapstruct, to allow them to cooperate.

component.name: lombok
component.description: Spice up your java: Automatic Resource Management, automatic generation of getters, setters, equals, hashCode and toString, and more!

component.name: reactive-streams
component.description: A Protocol for Asynchronous Non-Blocking Data Sequence

component.name: duct-tape
component.description: General purpose resilience utilities for Java 8 (circuit breakers, timeouts, rate limiters, and handlers for unreliable or inconsistent results)

component.name: jsonassert
component.description: Write JSON unit tests in less code. Great for testing REST interfaces.

component.name: spring-boot-security-oauth2-resource-server

component.name: spring-boot-starter-actuator
component.description: Starter for using Spring Boot's Actuator which provides production ready features to help you monitor and manage your application

component.name: spring-boot-starter-cache
component.description: Starter for using Spring's caching support

component.name: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa
component.description: Starter for using Spring Data JPA with Hibernate

component.name: spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server

component.name: spring-boot-starter-test
component.description: Starter for testing Spring Boot applications with libraries including JUnit Jupiter, Hamcrest and Mockito

component.name: spring-boot-starter-tomcat
component.description: Starter for using Tomcat as the embedded servlet container

component.name: spring-boot-starter-validation
component.description: Starter for using Java Bean Validation with Hibernate Validator

component.name: spring-boot-starter-web
component.description: Starter for building web, including RESTful, applications using Spring MVC. Uses Tomcat as the default embedded container (deprecated in favor of spring-boot-starter-webmvc)

component.name: spring-boot-starter-webflux
component.description: Starter for using WebFlux and Reactor Netty

component.name: spring-boot-starter
component.description: Core starter, including auto-configuration support, logging and YAML

component.description: Core Spring concepts underpinning every Spring Data module.

component.description: Spring Data module for JPA repositories.

component.description: Isolated container management for Java code testing
